pageTitle: Depop Fee Calculator Calculate Depop Fees Instantly
pageDescriptionBefore: Stop guessing your payout enter your sale price and I'll calculate your exact Depop fees in seconds.
hintShipping: Depop fees are calculated on item price plus buyer shipping.
hintItemCost: Enter what you paid for the item to calculate net profit after fees.
importantBody: Fees apply to the total transaction amount (item price + buyer shipping). US/UK sellers pay 0% Depop selling fee on new listings; Australia and international sellers pay 10%. Rates vary slightly by payment method.
resultsSubtitle: Depop fees, processing fees, and your net payout
emptyHint: Enter your sale price and seller details, then click Calculate to see your payout.
proTip1: Price with fees built in before you list — run every item through the calculator first.
proTip2: Remember buyer-paid shipping is included in the fee base for processing charges.
proTip3: US and UK sellers: refresh pre-2024 listings (edit & save) to migrate to 0% selling fee.
proTip4: International sellers need higher list prices than US/UK peers for the same net margin.
proTip5: Compare Depop payout to Grailed, Poshmark, and Mercari before choosing where to list.
errSalePrice: Enter a valid item sale price greater than zero.
